violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being (side by side refrigerator in building) used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. The thermostat of the refrigerator was turned to a lower setting to correct the violation. The refrigerator thermometer should be observed in cooler to verify correct operating temperature of at least 41?F. | COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being (small silver/black refrigerator in building) used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. The thermostat of the refrigerator was turned to a lower setting to correct the violation. The refrigerator thermometer should be observed in cooler to verify correct operating temperature of at least 41?F.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test strips/papers noted not provided.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory noted with no hot or cold running water provided. A temporary hand sink set up (jug with flip style spigot) is required on a TEMPORARY ONLY basis until the hot and cold running water is fixed in order to continue operation. Re-inspection of the plumbing in the food truck will occur on or before Oct. 2nd 2025. Both hot and cold running water must be provided to the all faucets.
